# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Follow the canonical repository instructions in `AGENTS.md`.

For every coding task:

1. Read the root `AGENTS.md`.
2. Read any nearer local `AGENTS.md` that applies to the changed files.
3. Read `.agent/skills/README.md` and only the relevant skills under `.agent/skills/`.

Keep changes minimal, secure, testable, and aligned with existing repository patterns. Final responses should be concise and include changed files, validation, and any unresolved risks when applicable.
